who's listening actually likes ppv traffic and probably really annoyed by it um but what ppv traffic is basically you would go onto a website and then you click a particular link or you land on a particular website and out of nowhere you have this big pop-up advertising a totally different product that may or may not have anything to do with the websites you were on and then you exit that particular page and then carry on doing whatever it is you're doing now that pop-up that annoying unsolicited pop-up was a ppv ad or pay per view ad and what that is basically and it's all above board so i know it sounds so it's spyware but it but it isn't it's actually adware so what would happen is you would only receive that ad if you for instance downloaded a useful tool bar or downloaded a game or whatever and you would have noticed that in those terms and conditions after downloading that tool bar or we'll take you all downloading that piece of software or downloading that that computer game there was actually a little comment there that said that as a result you'll be put into a particular network and you can then be presented with certain advertisements now having clicked yes now you can be targeted by advertisers and they can present their offers every time you approach get onto particular websites now the reason happens only when you go onto some websites and not when you go onto all websites is because of the way ppv traffic is typically targeted it's not targeted on keywords right so we can do a search campaign for instance we can target our visitors based on the words they actually write in the search box so for instance if you are in a carpet cleaning company we can run a search campaign that tests excuse me that targets people who write the words carpet cleaner in sydney or cheap carpet cleaner in sydney or best carpet cleaner in sydney or you know most affordable carpet cleaner in sydney whatever you see what we've done there in effect is we've actually targeted the traffic based on key words okay the other way you can actually target another popular way is by websites okay so you can target based on the website somebody visited so what i would do if i was running a ppv campaign is if i was in the the the health and fitness space i would collect a 100 to a thousand different URLs or even 10 20 000 so in these like i would click the whole bunch of URLs that i think people who are interested in losing weight would visit okay so that could be simple as going on google and writing something like how do i lose weight fast and then copy and pasting the URLs or alternatively i can use different URL tools so i can use different tools that are different URL scraper tools that are going to scrape the competitors or scrape relevant sites or similar sites or if somebody's visited this site they're likely to visit that site and all these tools exist and you can find them pretty effortlessly online and you just collect a whole bunch of URLs as many URLs as you can when you're setting up your ppv campaign you get all those URLs paste them into the targeting section and now you know that every time somebody actually visits that particular site and they're actually part of the ppv network because of course they've taken advantage of whatever it is the ppv network they've offered them whether it's a game or a or a toolbar or an extension or a piece of software whatever it is they offered them to get onto the network every time that particular person visits that site you're able to go in a pop-up and that's what ppv traffic is now there are a whole bunch of networks there's only one that's actually worth any amount of time and that's traffic vents i wouldn't focus on the others they're quite frankly crap and they're just cost a whole lot of money and you'll see almost no return from them but traffic vents you can see a significant amount of success depending on your product you've got to be mass market you really have to have a product that everybody wants you know by mass market i mean health fitness weight loss relationships making money that kind of thing you know mass market product like that you can actually accomplish so you can actually win some kick some goals and make some wins off a platform like traffic vents what you need to be mindful about traffic vent is they do have $1,000 minimum buy-in so you actually have to pay a thousand dollars to actually get the campaign started you use that thousand dollars of course in advertising it's not an entry fee or a sign-up fee it's actually credited towards your ad spend but they do limit the amount of advertisers who can use the platform will take advantage of it by having that minimum $1,000 initial ad spend so be wary of ppv approach it with caution i don't love it i think you can accomplish some wins from it especially mass market i know some people would argue that you can target at a lot much more granular level through ppv i haven't seen it accomplished with much success that being said you may find yourself running a small ppv campaign and it just being a real runaway hit and you scale really quickly because the reach is actually decent for mass market products but again even if you can target at a granular level you will not be able to scale you just don't have the capacity to scale excuse me the network doesn't have the capacity to scale it doesn't have that kind of reach so just be mindful of that when we're talking when you're running ppv traffic the next one the next and final platform we're going to talk about a constant discovery platforms now it's a pretty new traffic channel actually and what it is basically is you would be sending traffic as opposed to sending it directly to your lead page or sending it directly to an opt-in page remember who we spoke about the most important web pages if you guys remember there was one page that we haven't spoken about since since that module where we spoke about the most important web pages i think it was module two and that was the content page do you guys remember that now the reason we included any one of the most important web pages is because it serves a few functions one you can actually put a retargeting pixel on there and start following people around the net who have landed on your page before and we'll talk about that in our looping module now two you can add a little bit of authority you can speak a whole really highly in a news voice or in an advertorial type approach about your particular product and you can add a certain amount of credibility and authority to that offering and thirdly and finally some platforms require it so some of the content discovery platforms with content discovery channels like Outbrain and Tabula which are the two most popular actually don't allow you to send traffic to anything other than content right you need to send it to them to news like content and what would happen is someone would be on a particular site so this is how somebody would end up on your website after you start a after you run an Outbrain or Tabula campaign or a content discovery campaign so somebody would be on your site that we visit on a site excuse me and it's typically going to be a news type site right or they're reading a particular article they're going to scroll down the article and then you're going to see a list of different thumbnails with uh with images and a compelling copy about something interesting it's usually something um it's it has to spike interest and it's usually a subject matter that if not raunchy it's celebrity based or it's offering a big promise or there's some kind of a scare tactic there you know about you know watch her most dangerous food tweet or so forth let's actually look at an example so this will look familiar to you guys see you've just read a particular article online and you end up these particular suggestions from the web and you can see they're on the top right hand corner of that image says buy tabula tabula is that particular ad network and you can read all these different kinds of compelling headlines game of thrones vengeance is coming in so the next game of thrones wins it coming uh emma Watson on american boys kim and karnia is ridiculously extravagant home you know you can see the picture of that home there so the purpose of these particular ads is uh really to get the visitor to click on the link for read about this particular interesting subject matter and then once they're on that page they're likely to be pixels so you can be retargeted around online they're also likely to be presented with some kind of an offer through a direct link and that linking goes straight to a sales page that link may go to an opt-in page to get them into our sales funnel and the the the option is really limitless the the only condition of course is that the content sorry the um visitor actually lands on useful content as opposed to landing directly on our lead page or an opt-in page or the first page of our funnel now i'd be i'd approach this particular platform with um with a whole lot of care as well and um i'd approach
